progress_summary: v1.4 complete. All 8 PRs in the ADEV-328 → ADEV-337 chain merged (per Linear status=Done): PR 1 #192 (ADEV-328 pack registry architecture), PR 2 #203 (ADEV-329 backfill 5 packs), PR 3 #207 (ADEV-330 dispatcher + api-dev pack-read + kind:mobile), PR 4 (ADEV-334 modern web bulk — elixir/bun/deno + phoenix/remix/sveltekit/solid), PR 5 (ADEV-335 enterprise bulk — java/csharp/kotlin/php + spring/dotnet-aspnet/laravel), PR 6 #218 (ADEV-336 Apple/iOS — swift + swiftui + ios + app-store adapter), PR 6.5 #216 (ADEV-343 mobile bulk — kotlin-android + flutter + react-native-expo + play-store), PR 7 (ADEV-337 hosting adapters — railway/netlify/heroku/aws-amplify), PR 8 (ADEV-331 site surfaces + v1.4 release). Production is on main (latest a1b36e5 after PRs #213/#221/#223/#225/#231 shipped the navigation overhaul + /changelog roadmap timeline + Linear-connected feature-request form on top of v1.4). v1.5 ("Build the AI app", ADEV-344) is in the planning phase with 5 sprint children (ADEV-345 foundation, ADEV-346 claude-api+rag-forge, ADEV-347/348 agent-forge+prompt-ops — duplicates of each other, one should be cancelled, ADEV-349 site+GTM). All 5 sprints already labelled `roadmap-visible`; an earlier session also labelled 3 shipped v1.4 issues (ADEV-336/343/330) so the public /changelog roadmap surfaces both shipped wins and upcoming sprints once a build with LINEAR_API_KEY exported runs. Side thread now active: PR #233 (Resend-powered POST /api/email-pipeline + name input on /pipeline-builder Step 5) routed to app-architect in BUILD mode (no /discover or /spec — spec was the user's brief), opened ready-for-review on claude/cloudflare-email-pipeline-cm8n0. This commit repairs the orchestrator.checkpoint.json that GitHub's auto-merge of main into the PR branch (commit 1a3293a) left with duplicate keys + missing array commas — the cause of the Worker-CI checkpoint:validate failure.

key_decisions: v1.4 theme: coverage-as-a-plugin-registry. skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + reference docs replace hardcoded stack tables.
Apple/iOS ships in v1.4.0 (PR 6) — pressure-tests the kind: mobile dispatch branch. Android/Flutter/RN deferred to v1.5 once release-ops handles Play Store + EAS.

Distribution model: bundle-everything in opchain-skills.zip. Per-pack flags (skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled) filter what stack-forge OFFERS, not what's downloaded — keeps regulated/air-gapped installs intact.
5 skills version-bump 1.2.0 → 1.4.0 (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops). Other ~13 skills stay at 1.2.0.
8-PR sequencing: PRs 1-3 serial (architecture → backfill → dispatcher), PRs 4-7 parallelizable, PR 8 last (release).
ADEV-333 was created in error during scope shift; cancelled as duplicate of ADEV-332.

LHCI a11y failures on #187 (TOC touch size, code-block contrast, band labels, changelog links) are pre-existing — unrelated to the JSON-only diff. Standing up as ADEV-338 family on a separate branch off main, NOT BLOCKING v1.4.

user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when the PR sequence is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics (downloads vs visibility, plugin pattern) before approving implementation.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.
Approves merges promptly once CI is green; deploys are always manual.
Skips non-actionable bot replies on PRs (no noise back to LHCI bot).

next_actions: Watch PR #233 CI (Worker / Site / LHCI) via the subscribed webhook events. This commit repairs the orchestrator.checkpoint.json that GitHub's auto-merge corrupted; the next CI run should pass checkpoint:validate. If anything else fails, investigate from the github-webhook-activity message and either fix on-branch or surface to the user.

Once PR #233 is green + merged: hand off to user for Resend setup steps (verify opchain.dev sending domain → `wrangler secret put RESEND_API_KEY` on staging + prod → manual `npm run deploy:staging` → eyeball → `npm run deploy`). Implementation guide delivered earlier in this conversation.

Deploy unblock — user reported /changelog roadmap empty-state shows the dev-only build hint on staging. Cause: `npm run deploy:staging` ran without LINEAR_API_KEY exported, so gen-roadmap.mjs wrote an empty file. Fix is operational: `export LINEAR_API_KEY=lin_api_…` then `npm run deploy:staging`. PR #231 ALSO gates the build-note to dev-only, so even an empty pull renders cleanly in prod once deployed.

Resolve the v1.5 Sprint 3 duplicate in Linear: ADEV-347 and ADEV-348 are both titled `v1.5 Sprint 3 — agent-forge + prompt-ops bodies`. Both are currently labelled `roadmap-visible` so they'll both show on the public roadmap. Pick one canonical, cancel the other.

When v1.5 Sprint 1 (ADEV-345) starts, orchestrator picks back up — first cross-skill question will be how the four new AI-native skills register with the existing pipeline DAG and which gets the `auto-invoked-by` slot in app-architect's design phase.

reconciliation_2026_05_15.trigger: GitHub's auto-merge of origin/main into the PR branch (commit 1a3293a, authored by asfbay-bit) overlapped with the prior reconcile in commit 2c1f381. The auto-merge took both versions of three conflict regions (header, progress_table, next_actions) without adding the inter-section commas that JSON requires; checkpoint:validate failed on the resulting file at line 40 col 5, breaking the Worker CI step.
reconciliation_2026_05_15.fix: Hand-rewrote orchestrator.checkpoint.json to consolidate the two branches' content into a single valid document: kept theirs' v1.4-shipped / v1.5-planning narrative, appended the email-pipeline thread, deduplicated progress_table rows, and put the PR #233 watch action at the top of next_actions.
